Custom Giant Outdoor Banner Display for High-Impact Advertising

The Giant Outdoor Banner Display features a rotating wind-resistant design that prevents blow-over while maximizing visibility for your custom advertising message. This professional-grade display system holds a 42" x 10-foot banner with precision mounting rings that keep your banner taut and readable at all times.

The telescoping display structure accommodates custom printed banners up to 120" x 42" and includes a fillable base for water or sand ballast. The rotating mechanism allows the display to move naturally with wind conditions while maintaining structural integrity for long-term outdoor installations.

Each Giant Outdoor Banner Display includes both the complete hardware system and a full-color custom printed banner. The display can accommodate single or double-sided banner configurations for maximum advertising impact in high-traffic commercial locations.

Professional banner display systems are ideal for storefronts, trade shows, construction sites, real estate marketing, and permanent outdoor advertising installations where visibility and durability are essential.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

13 Oz Vinyl Material for Outdoor Banner Display Durability

13 Oz Vinyl Banner Material: Our premium 13 oz vinyl material provides the standard durability required for banner display applications. This heavy-weight vinyl withstands outdoor weather conditions while maintaining print quality and structural integrity for extended display periods.

Double-Sided Vinyl Option: Available for banner displays requiring visibility from multiple viewing angles. Double-sided vinyl material allows for different graphics on each side or identical messaging for 360-degree visibility.

Material Specifications: Vinyl banner material is temperature-sensitive and may experience slight dimensional changes due to heat application during printing and finishing processes. Acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot to accommodate natural material characteristics.

For applications requiring precise dimensional tolerances, consult with our customer service team to discuss your specific installation requirements and material recommendations.

Request a sample packet of banner display materials to evaluate material quality and finish options for your project.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Finishing Options for Giant Outdoor Display Installation

Mounting Ring System: Precision-placed mounting rings along the display shaft and horizontal banner bar ensure proper banner positioning and eliminate banner flutter during wind conditions.

Reinforced Edge Finishing: All banner edges receive reinforced hemming to withstand tension from the mounting ring system and prevent tearing during installation or removal.

Weather-Resistant Finishing: UV-resistant inks and protective finishing treatments help maintain banner color and material integrity during extended outdoor exposure.

Custom Size Accommodation: While the standard banner size is 120" x 42", custom sizing options can be discussed for specialized display requirements or unique installation specifications.

Professional finishing ensures reliable banner performance throughout the display period and facilitates easy banner replacement when updating advertising messages.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Giant Outdoor Banner Display Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production scheduling to accommodate your advertising timeline requirements. Production times range from two to five business days, allowing you to select the timeline that best meets your project needs.

Production Time Options

2 Business Days Express: Expedited production for urgent advertising campaigns or last-minute display requirements. Ideal when you need your Giant Outdoor Banner Display system quickly delivered.

3 Business Days Standard: Our most popular production timeline offering optimal balance between speed and scheduling flexibility. This option provides reliable turnaround for most advertising projects.

5 Business Days Saver: Extended production timeline offering cost savings for projects with flexible installation schedules. Perfect for planned advertising campaigns with advance notice.

Production Schedule Notes:

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day
  • Production time begins when artwork files are complete and approved
  • Proof requests extend timeline until approval confirmation is received
  • Emergency same-day production may be available in specific cases

Total delivery time includes both production time and selected shipping method. Contact customer service for rush production availability and emergency timeline requirements.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Giant Outdoor Banner Display Orders

All Giant Outdoor Banner Display orders require payment completion before production begins. We accept multiple payment methods to accommodate different business purchasing requirements.

Credit Card Payment: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards for immediate order processing. Credit cards are charged only after order approval and artwork confirmation.

Check Payment: Business checks are accepted and must be received before production begins. Check orders require additional processing time for payment clearance before entering the production queue.

Payment Processing: Your payment method will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your complete order details, including artwork specifications and delivery requirements.

For detailed information about check payment procedures and processing timelines, review our check payment guidelines.

Contact our customer service team for assistance with corporate payment arrangements or special billing requirements for large banner display orders.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Giant Outdoor Banner Display Delivery

Giant Outdoor Banner Display systems ship via UPS Ground unless alternative shipping methods are specified during checkout. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight, dimensions, and destination address.

Shipping Methods Available

  • Economy Shipping: 5–10 business days delivery time
  • Standard Shipping: 3–5 business days delivery time
  • Three Day: 2 business days delivery time
  • Two Day: 2 business day delivery time
  • Overnight: 1 business day delivery time

Package Tracking: You will receive tracking information once your Giant Outdoor Banner Display ships. Track your package through the shipping carrier's website using the provided tracking number.

Large Package Considerations: Additional shipping charges apply to oversized orders. The Giant Outdoor Banner Display hardware creates a substantial package that may require special handling or freight shipping depending on destination.

Delivery Protection: After shipment, all shipping company terms and conditions apply. Damaged packages must be reported immediately with damaged goods returned for replacement. Lost packages are replaced after shipping company confirms loss, typically requiring 7–10 business days.

For shipping questions or special delivery requirements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Commercial Uses for Giant Outdoor Banner Displays

Retail Storefront Advertising: Giant Outdoor Banner Displays provide high-visibility advertising for retail locations, shopping centers, and commercial districts where attracting foot traffic is essential.

Construction Site Signage: The wind-resistant rotating design makes these displays ideal for construction sites, development projects, and infrastructure work where permanent signage isn't practical.

Real Estate Marketing: Real estate professionals use Giant Outdoor Banner Displays for subdivision marketing, commercial property advertising, and open house promotion where maximum visibility attracts potential buyers.

Trade Show and Event Advertising: Portable banner display systems work effectively for outdoor trade shows, festivals, farmers markets, and community events requiring professional advertising presence.

Automotive Dealership Displays: Car dealerships and automotive businesses utilize rotating banner displays for sale events, new model announcements, and service promotions in high-traffic areas.

Restaurant and Hospitality Marketing: Restaurants, hotels, and hospitality businesses deploy banner displays for seasonal promotions, special events, and directional advertising to guide customers to their locations.

The rotating wind-resistant design ensures reliable performance in outdoor environments while the professional appearance maintains brand credibility across all commercial applications.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Giant Outdoor Banner Display Printing

Preferred File Formats: Vector-based files such as .eps with fonts converted to outlines produce the highest print quality for Giant Outdoor Banner Displays. We also accept high-resolution .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files for printing.

Resolution Requirements: Digital artwork should be 300 dpi or higher resolution to ensure crisp, professional printing results on the large 120" x 42" banner format.

File Size Limitations: Upload files up to 60 MB through our online system. For larger files, contact customer service for alternative file transfer instructions to ensure fastest processing.

Professional Design Assistance

Our in-house graphic design team can create custom artwork for your Giant Outdoor Banner Display. Professional design services include layout creation, logo optimization, and text formatting specifically for large-format outdoor display visibility.

Artwork Proofs and Approvals

Order Proofs: Request an order proof to review artwork, verify order details, pricing, and shipping information before production begins. Production will not start until you provide approval confirmation.

Color Match Proof System: For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction for your specific brand requirements. Contact customer service for color-critical artwork consultation.

If you're unsure about artwork quality or file requirements, our professional graphic designers will evaluate your files and provide recommendations for optimal print results on your Giant Outdoor Banner Display.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Giant Outdoor Banner Display Today

Transform your outdoor advertising with a professional Giant Outdoor Banner Display system that combines durability, visibility, and weather resistance for maximum marketing impact. Our complete display packages include both the rotating hardware system and a custom-printed 120" x 42" banner designed specifically for your business.

The wind-resistant rotating design ensures your advertising message remains visible and protected in all weather conditions, while the professional appearance maintains your brand credibility in high-traffic commercial locations.

Ready to Get Started?

  • Choose from our professional template designs or upload your custom artwork
  • Select your preferred production timeline from 2-5 business days
  • Add professional design services if you need custom artwork creation
  • Select shipping method to meet your installation timeline

Our customer service team of professional graphic designers is available Monday–Friday 8AM–4PM CST to assist with artwork questions, installation guidance, and technical specifications.

Need immediate assistance? Call our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 or toll-free at (866) 419-7446 for expert guidance on your Giant Outdoor Banner Display project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Giant Outdoor Banner Display FAQ

What are the dimensions of the Giant Outdoor Banner Display?

The Giant Outdoor Banner Display accommodates a 120" x 42" custom printed banner. The telescoping hardware system adjusts to hold the banner securely with mounting rings positioned along the shaft and horizontal banner bar.

How does the rotating wind-resistant design work?

The display features a rotating mechanism that allows the entire banner system to move with wind conditions, preventing the structure from blowing over while maintaining banner visibility from multiple angles.

What materials are used for the custom banner?

We use premium 13 oz vinyl material as the standard option, with double-sided vinyl available for displays requiring graphics visible from multiple directions. Both materials provide weather resistance for outdoor installations.

How do I stabilize the Giant Outdoor Banner Display?

The base can be filled with water or sand to provide ballast and stability. The rotating design reduces wind resistance while the weighted base keeps the display securely positioned.

Can I order replacement banners for my existing display hardware?

Yes, replacement banners are available for existing Giant Outdoor Banner Display hardware. You can order new banners when updating your advertising message or replacing worn banners.

What file formats do you accept for custom banner artwork?

We prefer vector-based .eps files with fonts converted to outlines, but also accept high-resolution .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files. Artwork should be 300 dpi or higher for optimal print quality.

How long does production take for a Giant Outdoor Banner Display?

Production times range from 2-5 business days depending on your selected timeline. Express 2-day production is available for urgent projects, while 5-day production offers cost savings for flexible schedules.

What shipping options are available for the display system?

Standard shipping is UPS Ground, with expedited options including overnight, 2-day, and 3-day delivery. The complete hardware system creates a substantial package that may require special handling depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
